description_long: This object is a small commercial storefront with two prominent blue-and-white striped awnings mounted above large display windows on either side of a central glass door. The awnings are rectangular, projecting outward from the facade, and feature scalloped lower edges for a decorative touch. The building itself is a light beige color with a flat roof, and the awnings are supported by simple, fixed frames attached to the wall above the windows. The structure sits on a dark rectangular base, suggesting a sidewalk or pavement. No branding or signage is visible on the awnings or the building exterior. The overall design is clean and modern, suitable for a small shop or café in an urban setting.
description: A beige storefront with two blue-and-white striped, scalloped awnings above large windows and a central glass door, set on a dark base.
description_view_0: Front view showing both striped awnings, the central glass door, and the main facade details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the left awning and the window beneath it.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain beige wall with no windows or awnings visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the right awning and its supporting structure above the window.
attribute_mounting_location: wall-mounted above storefront windows and door
